name: graphql-analytics
description: Lightweight, self-hostable analytics tool for GraphQL APIs

scripts.build: npm run build:collector && npm run build --workspace=packages/sdk-core && npm run build --workspace=packages/sdk-apollo && npm run build --workspace=packages/sdk-express && npm run build --workspace=packages/sdk-fastify && npm run build --workspace=apps/dashboard && npm run build --workspace=examples/test-server
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=packages/sdk-core" "npm run dev:collector" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/dashboard"
